title: Vladimir Putin: Power, Greed, Obsession
overview: Out of the chaos of the 90’s, a relatively unknown figure rose to occupy an untouchable position in a country spanning 11 timezones. Situating himself in the right circles, a young Vladimir Putin intends to revive the Soviet Union...at any cost.
